name: Central Pattaya
description: The heart of the action. We offer free delivery to all hotels and condos in Central Pattaya.

name: Jomtien
description: Family-friendly beach vibes. Perfect for long-term rentals and quiet stays.

name: Naklua
description: Experience the local side of Pattaya. Fast delivery to North Pattaya and Naklua area.

name: Pratumnak
description: The 'Beverly Hills' of Pattaya. Upscale stays deserve upscale rental service.

name: Wongamat
description: Exclusive beachfront living. We deliver right to your luxury high-rise lobby.

name: North Pattaya
description: Home to Terminal 21 and luxury resorts. Easy access to the highway for Bangkok trips.

name: South Pattaya
description: Close to Walking Street and the pier. Ideal for those heading to Koh Larn.

name: East Pattaya
description: The 'Dark Side' — popular with expats and families near the scenic lakes.

name: Bang Saray
description: A charming fishing village just 20 minutes from Pattaya. Perfect for a day trip.

name: Na Jomtien
description: Home to trendy beach clubs and big name resorts. We deliver to all villas.

name: Huai Yai
description: Rural beauty meets modern luxury villas. A car is essential in this area.

name: Bang Lamung
description: The industrial and local heart. We serve all residential and business areas.

name: Sattahip
description: Beautiful navy beaches and clear water. Start your coastal road trip here.
